title: Synaedrys ovalis
intro: Synaedrys ovalis, also known as the oval-leaved hawthorn or synaeda, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Synaedrys ovalis include flavonoids, such as quercetin and epicatechin, as well as oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs) and phenolic acids. Synaedrys ovalis is commonly used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as extracts and capsules, which are often used to support heart health and prevent cardiovascular disease.
